items.title: Lyft Uses Mapping Intelligence to Reduce Friction in Gated Community Pickups
items.summaryShort: Lyft Uses Mapping Intelligence to Reduce Friction in Gated Community Pickups. Lyft details a new pickup experience to improve reliability in gated communities, where 25–30% of rides face routing and access challenges.

items.title: Building and Scaling a Platform with Project-as-a-Service
items.summaryShort: Building and Scaling a Platform with Project-as-a-Service. When a platform started with total developer autonomy, teams felt overwhelmed and ended up solving the same problems in completely different ways.

items.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 and Codex Reach General Availability on Amazon Bedrock
items.summaryShort: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 and Codex Reach General Availability on Amazon Bedrock. OpenAI's GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, and Codex are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, one month after OpenAI revised its exclusive Azure arrangement.

items.title: Presentation: Building and Scaling UI Systems for Internal Tools at Meta
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Building and Scaling UI Systems for Internal Tools at Meta. Cindy Zhang discusses the evolution of XDS, a unified UI system powering 10,000+ internal tools.

items.title: Microsoft Open-Sources PostgreSQL Extension for In-Database Durable Execution
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Open-Sources PostgreSQL Extension for In-Database Durable Execution. Recently open-sourced by Microsoft, pg_durable is a PostgreSQL extension that enables durable workflows to run natively inside the database, eliminating the need

items.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations
items.summaryShort: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations. Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.

items.title: Pool's new app turns your screenshots into something useful
items.summaryShort: Pool's new app turns your screenshots into something useful. Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, trav

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
